dialogos.texto_en: Okay, I'll open it now!
Good morning, Fu-kun.
Ah, you came.
We went to the convenience store\nand bought the necessities.\nLike water, and foods that are good for digestion.
How is Ichika doing?
She's in the same condition as last night.\nHer consciousness is clear, but...
I'll be fine.\nMy fever isn't high or anything.
I'm still worried!
Don't you think\nwe should ask the hotel to call a doctor?
Sorry, I appreciate you looking out for me,\nbut I don't want to make a big deal out of this.
But what if you got some kind of illness...
No, I think I'm just exhausted.
I haven't told everyone,\nbut I've been working really hard recently.
Oh really?
It was difficult trying to get this week off.\nBeing successful sure is tough.
(That's true, I couldn't believe she got a week off, but...\n I guess she worked in advance to get it?)
Ah, no one needs to feel responsible, okay?\nI came here on my own will.
So, if I take it easy today,\nI'll probably feel better.\nI'll keep quiet at the hotel.
Everyone, go sightseeing as planned.
...Huh?
Don't say 'huh.'\nYou guys were all looking forward to go to \nthe Valley of Gangala and Okinawa World, right?
Come on, it's a waste of time to stay here,\nyou guys should leave early. Go ahead.
There's no way we're going.
...What?
We can't just leave you behind, Ichika.
But still, it's my own fault that I collapsed.
If I had managed myself better,\nthis wouldn't have happened, you know?
No one thinks it's your fault.
I'm at fault here.
So don't worry about it.\nSince we've come all the way to Okinawa,\nyou guys enjoy yourselves.
No, we'll stay with you.
Even if it's a mistake on your part, Ichika,\nor the sadness of not being able to go together...\nit's all part of being quintuplets, you know.
Haha, what a dilemma.
(I can understand both their feelings,\n but we're at a standstill.)
We're all worried about you.\nUnderstand that, Ichika.
I understand perfectly.\nIf someone collapsed,\nI would say the same thing.
Then%p-2;――
But it still bothers me\nthat you guys feel less inclined to go because of me.\nI want you to understand that too.
Hmm.\nThen how about someone stays behind?
That would be the case if we meet in the middle.
If we keep arguing like this,\nIchika won't be able to rest...
Then I'll stay behind%p-2;――
No, I'll stay.
Fu-kun?
I was the one who was closest to Ichika yesterday.\nLet me take responsibility for not noticing.
Uesugi-kun...
Okay, we'll leave it to you, Futaro.
I'm fine with that too.
Me too!
Yes, I feel at ease with Fu-kun here.
Then it's settled.\nI'll stay and take care of Ichika.\nSorry, but take care of Raiha for me.
There's no point in everyone being here.\nOne person should be enough to take care of Ichika.
But...
Moreover, it might put pressure on Ichika, you know?\nYour desire to take care of her\ncould increase her guilt.
If you were in the same situation on a trip,\nwouldn't you want everyone else to go?
...Right.
Then you guys go.\nI'll stay here.
Uesugi-san?
Yeah, I said one person staying behind would be enough.
...Okay, I understand.\nI can entrust Ichika to you.
That's right.\nFu-kun is fine.
Then it's settled.\nI'll stay and take care of Ichika.\nSorry, but take care of Raiha for me.
Leave Ichika to me.
But...
I was the one who was closest to Ichika yesterday.\nAnd yet, I didn't notice that she was unwell until\nshe collapsed. Let me take responsibility for that.
If you start talking about responsibility,\neveryone is responsible.
...I'm Ichika's boyfriend.\nI wouldn't be able to forgive myself.
Her b-boyfriend...you say.
Come on...
It's hard to argue back when you say \nthings you don't usually say.
Yeah, we have no choice but to leave it to you,\nFutaro.
I feel relieved\nknowing that you'll be taking care of her, Uesugi-san.
Yes, me too.
Then it's settled.\nI'll stay and take care of Ichika.\nSorry, but take care of Raiha for me.
You can count on me for that!
Raiha, make sure you listen to everyone, okay?
Oh come on, I know already.\nI'm not a child.
Then, please take care of Ichika.
If anything happens, contact us immediately.\nDon't hesitate to do so.
Okay, got it.
Sorry for making you all worry.
Before apologizing, make sure to rest properly.\nListen to what Fu-kun says and rest.
Yeah.\nTake care.
